name: Algebraic Topology — Part 1: Homological Algebra
description: Chain complexes, boundary operators, homology, exact sequences, Snake Lemma, Five Lemma. Prerequisites: abelian groups.
mermaid:
graph TD
    RefAbGrp["Abelian groups"]
    DefChain["Def: Chain complex (C_n, ∂_n)"]
    DefBoundary["Def: Boundary operator ∂: C_n → C_{n-1}"]
    LemBoundSq["Lem: ∂² = 0"]
    DefCycles["Def: Cycles Z_n = ker ∂_n"]
    DefBoundaries["Def: Boundaries B_n = im ∂_{n+1}"]
    LemBSubZ["Lem: B_n ⊆ Z_n"]
    DefHomology["Def: Homology H_n = Z_n / B_n"]
    DefExact["Def: Exact sequence: im = ker"]
    DefShortExact["Def: Short exact sequence 0→A→B→C→0"]
    LemSnake["Lem: Snake Lemma"]
    LemFive["Lem: Five Lemma"]
    ThmLongExact["Thm: Short exact of chains ⇒ long exact in homology"]
    DefChainMap["Def: Chain map: commutes with ∂"]
    ThmChainMapHom["Thm: Chain map induces homomorphism on homology"]
    DefHomotopy["Def: Chain homotopy"]
    ThmHomotopyInv["Thm: Homotopic chain maps induce same H_* map"]
    RefAbGrp --> DefChain
    DefChain --> DefBoundary
    DefBoundary --> LemBoundSq
    DefBoundary --> DefCycles
    DefBoundary --> DefBoundaries
    LemBoundSq --> LemBSubZ
    DefCycles --> DefHomology
    DefBoundaries --> DefHomology
    LemBSubZ --> DefHomology
    DefExact --> DefShortExact
    DefShortExact --> LemSnake
    DefShortExact --> LemFive
    DefShortExact --> ThmLongExact
    DefChain --> DefChainMap
    DefHomology --> ThmChainMapHom
    DefChainMap --> ThmChainMapHom
    DefChainMap --> DefHomotopy
    DefHomotopy --> ThmHomotopyInv
    classDef ref fill:#bdc3c7,color:#333,stroke:#95a5a6
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class RefAbGrp ref
    class DefChain,DefBoundary,DefCycles,DefBoundaries,DefHomology,DefExact,DefShortExact,DefChainMap,DefHomotopy definition
    class LemBoundSq,LemBSubZ,LemSnake,LemFive lemma
    class ThmLongExact,ThmChainMapHom,ThmHomotopyInv theorem
